encounter.reason: Intake assessment following electronic social care referral from Cascade Community Health Center for food insecurity and transportation barriers identified on AHC HRSN screening
encounter.location: Rose City Community Services, 6530 SE 82nd Avenue, Portland, OR 97266

document_references.description: Documents the referral intake call between community health worker Janet Flores and patient Maria Chen. Covers review of AHC HRSN screening results (food insecurity and transportation barriers), client-provided context about household composition and financial strain, three services discussed and agreed upon (food pantry enrollment, SNAP application assistance, transit vouchers), and plan for follow-up call the following week to begin SNAP application. Notes referral status progression from requested to in-progress.
